name: zero-secret-auth-landing
description: Static academic landing page for the Zero Secret Server Authentication bachelor thesis project.

scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css
scripts.docs:archive: npm run docs:generate && powershell -NoProfile -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force artifacts | Out-Null; if (Test-Path 'artifacts/jsdoc-reference.zip') { Remove-Item 'artifacts/jsdoc-reference.zip' -Force }; Compress-Archive -Path 'reference/*' -DestinationPath 'artifacts/jsdoc-reference.zip' -Force"
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run docs:check

author: elaizav
